morning_thesis: Two-sided session forming. SPY opened at 735.08 (gap-up vs 5/6 close ~733). Tight distribution 09:30-10:00 capped at 735.40 (5+ touches). Sharp sell-off 10:00-10:20 to session low 733.55 on heavy volume (141K + 132K bars). Bounce off 733.55 on 107K vol = institutional defense. Ribbon flipped BEARISH on the move down (Fast 734.42 < Pivot 734.62 < Slow 734.68) but spread now 26c — below 30c directional floor. Setup is in transition. WAIT for ribbon to pick a side AND spread to expand before any entry. Falsifiable predictions: (1) 735.40 holds as resistance; (2) 733.55 holds as support; (3) ribbon spread >30c before 12:00 ET; (4) VIX stays <17.30; (5) no setup fires before 11:00 ET.

predictions.claim: 735.40 holds as resistance on its next test (after 10:30 ET)
predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5-min bar with close > 735.50
predictions.actual: Bull trap: SPY broke to 736.11 at 11:35, 5-min close ~735.84 at 11:40 exceeded 735.50 invalidation threshold. System offline during the break — missed the subsequent rejection.

predictions.claim: 733.55 holds as support on its next test (after 10:30 ET)
predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5-min bar with close < 733.45
predictions.actual: First close below 733.45 at ~12:04 (HB#4 spy=733.40). Session continued to 729.75. Level broke decisively — pre-FOMC selling overwhelmed the support.

predictions.claim: Ribbon spread expands above 30c before 12:00 ET, resolving chop
predictions.actual: Spread reached 35c by 12:04 ET (HB#4). Chop resolved in the right direction, 4 minutes past the trigger window. Invalidation technically tripped at 12:00 but chop did resolve shortly after.

predictions.claim: VIX stays below 17.30 today (no bearish-puts filter 8 eligibility)
predictions.invalidation: VIX prints > 17.30 with rising direction at any time today
predictions.actual: VIX session high 17.46. Rose above 17.30 with rising direction starting ~11:30 ET. FOMC day VIX expansion was predictable but not modeled. Invalidation tripped multiple times.

predictions.claim: No autonomous setup fires before 11:00 ET (chop resolution needed first)
predictions.invalidation: ENTER_BULL or ENTER_BEAR action emitted before 11:00 ET
predictions.actual: All ticks before 11:00 ET were HOLD, HOLD_DEV, or infrastructure failures. First valid HB#1 at 10:24 produced HOLD. No ENTER_BULL/BEAR emitted before 11:00.

surprises: FOMC May 7 at 14:00 ET was absent from macro-calendar.json — no autonomous veto fired; BULLISH_RECLAIM entered at 12:30 into pre-FOMC selling (primary operational failure of the day)
Bull trap at 736.11: 735.40 gave a clean false break to 736.11 before collapsing — resistance overshoot-and-reverse pattern, not named in playbook (candidate: RESISTANCE_OVERSHOOT_REVERSAL)
Pre-FOMC derisking drove $5+ SPY decline (735→729.75) in ~90min without a single news headline — institutional positioning pattern visible in hindsight
lesson: A 10/11 filter score is meaningless when the macro backdrop invalidates the direction thesis. FOMC was absent from macro-calendar.json; the fix is a mandatory Sunday audit of the next 5 trading days before every weekly open.
tomorrow_hint: TOMORROW: 735.40 overhead resistance, 729.75 session low floor, Friday = watch for gap fill or continuation
